message:
fix(analysis): deterministic eigenvectors + MinHash parity

- core: make power-iteration deterministic (seeded init vector) and canonicalize eigenvector sign for stable PCA/phase-portrait orientations across runs.
- web(anomaly.worker): use deterministic PCA power-iteration init to avoid occasional orthogonality/flip artifacts.
- wasm-compute: route min_hash_jaccard through the rolling/byte-based minhash_signature implementation (consistent U/T normalization + N resets); clamp k early; align eigenvector sign during power iteration to prevent oscillation.
- comparison(hgt-tracer): avoid double-caching MinHash signatures, and speed up GC sliding windows by scanning indices/char codes instead of slicing substrings.
